meta_title: For Students: user onboarding to Solve can't debug code (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome can't debug code. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Mastering User Onboarding to Debug Code
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with cryptic errors. Learn to implement user onboarding patterns that simplify debugging and accelerate your journey as a developer.
content.answer_block: Debugging isn't just about fixing syntax; it's about visibility. By implementing structured user onboarding, you create logging hooks and state-tracking flows that expose hidden bugs. Use Antigravity to architect your onboarding flow and Claude Code to automate the insertion of diagnostic telemetry, turning opaque failures into actionable data points.
content.intro:
The blank screen stares back, a silent testament to the hours spent chasing a bug that refuses to surface. You’ve checked the syntax, restarted the server, and scoured the docs, but the logic remains a black box. This is the rite of passage for every developer—the moment where frustration meets the ceiling of your current knowledge.

But what if your application could tell you exactly where it failed? By mastering user onboarding, you aren't just creating a welcome screen; you are building a diagnostic map. You’ll learn how to instrument your app's entry points, ensuring that every user action is tracked, validated, and ready for you to debug with precision.

steps.title: Define User Flow Schemas
steps.description: Before writing code, map out the onboarding states. This ensures you know exactly where a user should be at any given moment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a state machine diagram for a 3-step SaaS user onboarding flow, identifying potential failure points at each transition.

steps.title: Instrument Entry Point Logging
steps.description: Inject telemetry into your onboarding components to capture the user's progress and any errors thrown during state initialization.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a React hook 'useOnboardingLogger' that logs component mount status and error boundaries to a central debug store.

steps.title: Build Error-Boundary Wrappers
steps.description: Wrap your onboarding views in error boundaries to prevent app crashes and provide meaningful user feedback.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a robust ErrorBoundary component that captures stack traces and user metadata during onboarding failures.

steps.title: Simulate Failure States
steps.description: Force your onboarding flow to fail to ensure your debugging tools are catching the right signals.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a test suite that simulates missing user data during the onboarding process to verify the error logging logic.

steps.title: Analyze and Refine
steps.description: Use the telemetry data to pinpoint exactly which onboarding step causes the most friction or logic errors.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the log pattern generated by my onboarding flow and suggest architectural refactors to eliminate the primary bottleneck.

pro_tips: Always log the user's local state immediately before an API call during onboarding.
Use unique correlation IDs for every onboarding session to track bugs across distributed services.
Implement 'Silent Failures'—allow the user to proceed if a non-critical onboarding step fails, but flag it in your dashboard.
Use feature flags to toggle your onboarding telemetry on and off without redeploying code.
Map your onboarding errors to specific user segments to see if bugs are browser or device-specific.
content.next_steps: Once you have successfully instrumented your onboarding flow, move on to implementing a centralized error dashboard like Sentry or LogRocket to visualize the data you are now collecting.
content.conversion_block: You've moved from guessing to architecting. By building observability into your onboarding, you've turned the most difficult part of development into your greatest strength. Don't stop here; your portfolio needs more of this professional-grade engineering. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
